info.description: A comprehensive RESTful API service for managing SKUs, Channels, and their relationships with full audit logging capabilities.
info.title: Forecast Service API

get.description: Get a paginated list of alerts

parameters.description: Session ID returned by the run endpoint
parameters.name: session_id

post.description: Start a demand plan calculation job. Multiple jobs may run concurrently if their sku_filter values do not overlap. Request body is optional (defaults: current week, 110 weeks, default mode, 1 worker, all SKUs).

get.description: Returns the latest demand plan session ID for a given user_email. Returns session_id=0 when not found.

post.description: Saves a plan as draft (step 0)

Upload a CSV (DP × Channel × Region × YearMonth × Value in VND) to create a plan with
per-ShipTo disaggregation. MUF rows produce uplift details; non-MUF rows produce
opportunity details.
post.summary: Mass upload a promotion or innovation plan from CSV

parameters.description: Disaggregation method: RR3 | RR6 | RR9 | RR12 | RRSPLY
parameters.name: disaggregation_method

post.description:
Upload a CSV and get back baseline/uplift/total per (Channel × Region × DP × Month)
without creating any plan record. Baseline comes from SharedForecast/ForecastByScope.
post.summary: Preview a mass upload plan (no data is saved)

parameters.description: UOM of CSV values: vnd (default) | case
parameters.name: uom

Gets aggregated e_stock, sellin, and sellout from approved demand plans

Compares approved vs under-review demand plans
